narrative:
Precinct Perry South (precinct in Muskingum County) has 1,221 registered voters, with 51.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
